pattern: \b(how much|what would it cost|quote for|pricing for)\b
positive_examples: Can I get a quote for formatting?
risk_note: May overfire when quote is mentioned as an agreement prerequisite.

positive_examples: I do not need ghostwriting. I only want proofreading.
negative_examples: I do not need ghostwriting services of any type.
risk_note: Must not truncate legitimate long negation lists.
